data.title: Scaling Vision-Language Pretraining with Synthetic Captions
data.abstract: We present a scalable recipe for vision-language pretraining that replaces noisy web captions with model-generated synthetic captions.

tldr.text: A short, model-generated summary of the paper.

data.title: Efficient LoRA Fine-Tuning for Multimodal Models
data.abstract: We study parameter-efficient fine-tuning of large multimodal models and introduce a LoRA variant tailored to cross-attention layers.
